e1_sentence: It has been narrated on the authority of Umar ibn al-Khattab who said:  When it was the day on which the Battle of Badr was fought, the Messenger of  Allah (may peace be upon him) cast a glance at the infidels, and they were one  thousand while his own Companions were three hundred and nineteen
